title: 🔥定投成本线成核心压制
body: 市场处于深度寻底期。200日定投成本达$89,609，当前价格偏离-25.4%，显示筹码长期浮亏严重。AHR999跌至0.33，触及抄底区，说明抛压已衰竭但买盘未入场。多头防线仍在下移，抄底资金未见明显动作。何时能重回成本线上方？
body_en: The market is in deep bottom-fishing mode. The 200-day DCA cost sits at $89,609, with current price deviating by -25.4%, signaling severe long-term unrealized losses. AHR999 has dropped to 0.33, hitting the accumulation zone, indicating selling pressure is exhausted but buyers haven't stepped in yet. The bull line of defense is still shifting lower, and dip-buying capital remains absent. When can we reclaim ground above the cost line?
